site.title: Flintlock — Web Development, AI Automation & Cybersecurity Studio
site.description: Flintlock is a digital studio by two engineers specializing in high-performance web development, AI integration, automation, and cybersecurity. Built by engineers. Based in Morocco. Global clients.
hero.title:
Two artisans,
one forge.
hero.subtitle: We turn your idea into an online presence that attracts, runs itself, and stays protected.
hero.trust.label: Based in Morocco · Global clients
problem.title: The old way is broken.
problem.desc: Juggling a developer, an SEO agency and a security expert = wasted time, blown budget, nobody accountable.
problem.item1.desc: Developers, agencies, experts — each pulls in a different direction.
problem.item2.desc: Every vendor adds their margin. You end up paying more for less.
problem.item3.desc: When something breaks, no one takes responsibility.
solution.title: One forge. One partner.
solution.desc: We replace the chain of middlemen with a single technical partner. Design, build, automate, secure — end to end. Security is not an add-on; it's forged in from the first line of code.
solution.security_tag: Security forged from the first line of code.
solution.security_desc: Not an add-on — it's built into every step.
services.title: The Stations
service.web.title: Web & Apps
service.web.desc: High-performance digital platforms built with modern stacks. Fast, animated, conversion-optimised.
service.ai.title: AI Integration
service.ai.desc: Custom LLMs and generative agents embedded into your workflow. Not a chatbot — a real productivity multiplier.
service.automation.title: Automation
service.automation.desc: Eliminate repetitive tasks. Custom pipelines that run your operations on autopilot.
service.acquisition.title: Acquisition & Leads
service.acquisition.desc: SEO-optimised architecture + data-driven lead generation. Traffic that converts.
service.security.title: Security
service.security.desc: Built in by default. OWASP audits, hardening, OT expertise. Every line of code protected.
process.title: How we work
process.step1.desc: We learn your business, audit your current stack, and define the roadmap.
process.step2.desc: We craft the experience and build it with performance and accessibility baked in.
process.step3.desc: We wire automation and AI into your workflow so it runs without you.
process.step4.desc: Hardening, launch, monitoring. Then we iterate to keep you ahead.
proof.section.intro: Flintlock is a young studio — its founders aren't. Here's what we've built and delivered.
proof.block1.title: Our projects
proof.exploit.title: Exploit AI
proof.exploit.desc: AI & automation tool. A platform that orchestrates penetration testing with AI. Result: -85% audit time (45d → 7d). Pitched to investors.
proof.otshield.title: OT_Shield
proof.otshield.desc: Industrial security. Intrusion detection & prevention system (IDPS) for OT/ICS environments (OPC UA, Suricata, Elastic).
proof.whitehat.title: White Hat — emsi.ma
proof.whitehat.desc: Ethical offensive security. White-hat detection and responsible reporting of security vulnerabilities.
proof.block2.intro: As consultants at Fifty Five Digital, we also delivered:
proof.block2.title: Our experience
proof.jardin.title: Prix Jardin Majorelle
proof.jardin.desc: Full-stack dev + security audit. Official site of a 2026 architecture prize for a leading cultural institution. (Delivered at Fifty Five Digital.)
proof.revetpro.title: RevetPro
proof.revetpro.desc: Web development. Website for a construction & renovation company. (Project via Fifty Five Digital.)
proof.owasp.title: Security audits (OWASP)
proof.owasp.desc: On production websites. Black-box audits, critical vulnerability discovery + remediation. (Confidential clients — NDA.)
proof.recognition: EMSI Inventors Cup 2026 · Hack'Days @ UEMF · Responsible disclosure emsi.ma

team.abdo.desc: Leads engineering — high-performance web, deep AI integration, systems security. Built Exploit AI and OT_Shield.

team.tagline: We answer our own messages. No account managers, no filters.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.1.a: We don't believe in one-size-fits-all pricing. Every project is unique. Book a discovery call and we'll provide a custom, transparent quote.
faq.2.q: How long does a website take?
faq.2.a: A high-performance landing page takes 2-3 weeks. Complex web apps or deep AI integrations take 4-8 weeks.
faq.3.a: Yes. Security is built in from day one — OWASP best practices, infrastructure hardening, data protection. No separate consultant needed.
faq.4.q: Do you work with international clients?
faq.4.a: Absolutely. We operate globally and are fully bilingual in English and French.
faq.5.q: What if I already have a site?
faq.5.a: We audit your existing architecture, fix vulnerabilities, improve SEO and performance, or integrate new features.
cta.title: Ready to build?
footer.founded: Founded by Abdellah ERRAOUI & Faris BAHBAH.
geo.description: Flintlock is a Morocco-based digital studio founded by two engineers — Abdellah ERRAOUI and Faris BAHBAH — specializing in web development, AI integration, automation, and cybersecurity. We build high-performance websites and web applications using modern stacks (Astro, Tailwind CSS, Three.js), integrate custom LLMs and generative AI agents into business workflows, automate repetitive operations with custom pipelines, run OWASP security audits and penetration testing, and optimize for SEO and Core Web Vitals. We serve international clients in English and French. Our four-step process covers discovery, design, automation, and security-hardened launch. Founders have delivered projects including Exploit AI (AI-pentest orchestration), OT_Shield (OT/ICS intrusion detection), and white-hat security disclosures.
geo.keywords: web development studio, AI automation, cybersecurity, penetration testing, custom LLM integration, Morocco digital agency, OWASP audit, Core Web Vitals, Astro development, Tailwind CSS agency, Three.js development, generative AI agents, OT/ICS security, bilingual digital studio
